/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libcw2_world_spawner__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libcw2_world_spawner__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/cw2_world_spawner__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/cw2_world_spawner/srv/task_setup__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cw2_world_spawner__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/cw2_world_spawner/srv/task1_service__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cw2_world_spawner__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/cw2_world_spawner/srv/task2_service__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cw2_world_spawner__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/cw2_world_spawner/srv/task3_service__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
